title: Dashboards Bugs and Odd Behaviour

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I want to report on 2 differente issues with dashboards:

  1. The drag and stretch feature are buggy… My mouse hovers 5 inches and the widget (or its corner) just moves about 1 … It has been this way for sometime now. I think when the new dashboard experience was updating.

  2. This feature:

Is this really necessary? Double arrows, three dots and only then the menu?
I’m sure the trhee dots are more than enough.

Hope this get some attention… Thanks!
